query: SELECT id, name, email, role, clinicRole, clinicId, subscriptionStatus, subscriptionTier FROM users WHERE (subscriptionStatus = 'active' OR subscriptionStatus = 'trialing' OR trialStartedAt IS NOT NULL) AND (clinicRole IS NULL OR clinicRole != 'gestor');
